description: License policy for AGPL-3.0-or-later compatibility. AGPL-3.0-or-later is allowed as it is our project license and meets our compatibility requirements. AGPL-1.0 is explicitly denied because it is not compatible with AGPL-3.0-or-later and cannot be upgraded automatically; dependencies must use AGPL-3.0-or-later or a more permissive license. This distinction is important for version-specific compatibility and compliance.
